title: Reintroduce manual project-list filters alongside natural-language search
notes: Suggestion #14 from admin export (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-23). The root "Your projects" page now supports natural-language search, but legacy/manual filtering controls are missing. Add a hybrid search UI that keeps natural-language search primary while restoring explicit manual controls for: (a) case-insensitive substring matching, (b) source text language filter via menu, and (c) gloss language filter via menu. Consider placing manual controls below the NL search area to encourage migration without removing deterministic filter affordances. Ensure backward-compatible behavior and tests for combined/filter-only/NL-only queries.
